output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?driver(COUNT(?position) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?event rdfs:label "Australian Grand Prix" @en ; wdt:P31 wd:Q1915215 ; wdt:P17 wd:Q30 .
  ?driver wdt:P1542 ?position ; wdt:P1531 ?event .
  FILTER(?position IN(1 , 2 , 3))
}
GROUP BY ?driver
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1

  ?event rdfs:label "Australian Grand Prix" @en ; wdt:P31 wd:Q1915215 ; wdt:P17 wd:Q30 .
  ?driver wdt:P1542 ?position ; wdt:P1531 ?event .
  FILTER(?position IN(1 , 2 , 3))
}
GROUP BY ?driver
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1
